# s2_access_token (Resource)

Issues and revokes S2 access tokens.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "s2_access_token" "example" {
  token_id            = "my-token"
  auto_prefix_streams = false

  scope = {
    basins = {
      prefix = ""
    }

    streams = {
      prefix = "logs/"
    }

    access_tokens = {
      exact = "my-token"
    }

    op_groups = {
      account_read  = true
      account_write = false
      basin_read    = true
      basin_write   = true
      stream_read   = true
      stream_write  = true
    }

    ops = ["append", "read"]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `scope` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scope))
- `token_id` (String)

### Optional

- `auto_prefix_streams` (Boolean)
- `expires_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp when the token expires, for example 2030-01-01T00:00:00Z.

### Read-Only

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive)
- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier, equal to token_id.

- `op_groups` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scope--op_groups))
- `ops` (Set of String)
